title: WebLogic Application Deployment
description: Configuration schema for an Oracle WebLogic Server application deployment including source path, targets, staging mode, and security model.

sourcePath.description: Path to the application archive (EAR, WAR, JAR) or exploded directory on the administration server

targets.description: Target servers or clusters where this application is deployed

planPath.description: Path to the deployment plan XML file

planDir.description: Root directory for the deployment plan

stagingMode.description: How the application is staged on target servers

planStagingMode.description: How the deployment plan is staged on target servers

securityDDModel.description: Security deployment descriptor model that determines how security roles and policies are managed

versionIdentifier.description: Version identifier for the application used in production redeployment

deploymentOrder.description: Order in which this application is deployed relative to other deployments. Lower values are deployed first.

deploymentPrincipalName.description: Principal name used for deployment authorization

parallelDeployModules.description: Whether modules within an EAR are deployed in parallel

cacheInAppDirectory.description: Whether compiled JSPs and generated classes are cached in the application directory

validateDDSecurityData.description: Whether to validate security data in deployment descriptors
